title: Build a SpiderIQ Personalized Landing Page
summary: Build a personalized landing page via the /lp/{slug}/{place_id} URL pattern with merge tags fed by the SpiderIQ IDAP scraping pipeline. Use whenever the user asks for 'a personalized outreach page', 'a landing page per lead', 'a /lp/ page', 'one page per business with their name pre-filled', 'lead activation page', 'cold-outreach landing'. Walks through the dynamic_landing template, merge-tag vocabulary ({{ lead.name }}, {{ lead.city }}, {{ lead.email }}, etc.), the resolve_lead lookup, and end-to-end deploy with verification.
